title: Goblin Tricks negates opponent magic

card.rawText: Play this card from your hand when your opponent plays a magic card. Negate the card effect and send it to the cemetery or destroy 1 magic card on the field.

plan.title: Goblin Tricks negates opponent magic
plan.summary: Respond to opponent magic with Goblin Tricks and verify the original magic is negated and sent to cemetery.

notes: Goblin Tricks is in player_1 hand. Player_2 plays a standard magic with visible effect.

steps: Open Lightning response window for player_1.
Player_1 plays Goblin Tricks targeting the chain magic.

expectedAssertions.label: Opponent magic effect did not resolve

manualVerification: Confirm the alternate destroy-one-magic choice remains a separate branch.
riskNotes: This fixture covers the negation branch, not the destroy-mode choice branch.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The LLM only proposes the fixture. The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
